subcodes.first_line: O thou who art seated upon the throne of contentment! In accordance with the spirit of resignation, thou must submit and surrender unto the Sovereign of destiny, and efface thyself [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مستقر بر کرسی رضا از مقتضای روح رضا تسلیم و انقیاد بسلطان قضاء و محویت
subcodes.subjects: @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @all things are in motion; kinds of motion, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
